_README_BaseUrl: 服务器地址（含 http:// 前缀）
_README_WorkCellId: 用 clientsetup.exe 注册后填这里。0 = 未配置；启动时会自动尝试从环境变量 {MAC}_NPLA_WORKCELL_ID 读取
_README_EnabledTabs: 登录后显示的功能 Tab 子集。可选值: signoff=出片(Assembling), dehydration=脱水(Tissue Processing), archive=归档(Archiving), transfer=流转(Tracking)
_README_DataSources: DB 数据源数组。每项含 Name/Provider(SqlServer|MySql|Postgres|Sqlite|Oracle)/ConnectionString/Query/IdColumn/AuxColumns/TargetPanel/CronOrInterval。建议用 ConfigTool 可视化配置。Query 占位符支持 {date}/{today}/{now}/{user}。CronOrInterval 支持 '30m'/'2h' 等简单间隔。

_README_DataSourcesExample.Name: DB-SignOff-Today
_README_DataSourcesExample.Query: SELECT SlideId AS id, CaseId AS aux1 FROM slides WHERE scan_date='{today}'
